steps.title: Identify what the underlined portion expresses
steps.content: The phrase “which made me sad” directly signals what the underlined portion is doing: expressing Grande's emotional response to Mago's loss of interest.

steps.title: Match the function to the answer
steps.content: Choice A correctly identifies this function: the underlined portion expresses Grande's unhappiness—specifically her sadness—over Mago's disinterest in the doll. The other three either misname the emotion (B's anger instead of sadness), address something unrelated (C's description of how they played), or misidentify what the underlined portion is explaining (D's claim that it explains Mago's reluctance). That matches choice A—A is correct.
